calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: C & A Trucking, LLC and Christie Bunch, as follows:
Principal $25,161.45
Prejudgment Interest $1,807.64
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $710.00, for a total of $30,179.09
Judgment signed in open court.
